1.name: Research table
1.description: A nice place to think. Here colonists can generate research points

2.name: Explore the caves
2.description: The dark caves seem to contain useful ressources. Here colonists can gather minerals

3.name: Fields
3.description: Start toiling the fields, here the colonists can generate food

4.name: Plant flowers
4.description: Pretty up the colony with some colorful flowers, the colonists will enjoy the decorations

5.name: Irrigation
5.description: Start irragating the fields, increasing their production

6.name: Axes
6.description: Make axes for your colonists, this will help them gather more plantmatter

7.name: Tents
7.description: One man tents for your colonists, finally a place to rest

8.name: Pickaxes
8.description: Make pickaxes for your colonists, this will help them extract minerals from the mines more efficiently

9.name: Houses
9.description: More spacious housing for your colonists, these huts can fit two people. This is where the magic happen

10.name: Library
10.description: A better place to research, here you may even come up with all new ideas

11.name: Statues
11.description: Some statues to decortate the town, I'm sure the colonists will apreciate this

12.name: Fountain
12.description: A nice fountain, throw in a coin and make a wish

13.name: Crop diversity
13.description: Start cultivating more types of crops, to better feed the colony

14.name: Electronics
14.description: Study the posibilities of electronics for improving the colony

15.name: Biotech
15.description: Study the posibilities of biotechnology for improving the colony

16.name: Drills
16.description: Make drills the serve as improved mining tools, improving efficiency in the mines

17.name: Streetlights
17.description: Build some streetlights to ligth up the colony

18.name: Lumbermill
18.description: Improve gather of plant materials with the implementation of powered machinery

19.name: Humanities
19.description: A real science or something like that

20.name: Gene Sequencing
20.description: With this you can see the genetics of your colonists, and see what makes them tick

21.name: GMO
21.description: Produce more food than ever before with GMO technology!

22.name: Medicine
22.description: Cure your colonists illnesses with brand new medicine

23.name: Lethal injection
23.description: A cleaner way to get rid of undesireables, your colonists won't mind as much.

24.name: Axe murder
24.description: An axe is a simple way to cure depression

25.name: Psychology
25.description: Sit down and ask your colonists how they are

26.name: Dopaminergic stimulants
26.description: This is the good stuff, but its just too fleeting...

27.name: IV therapy
27.description: We've sovled the time issue, but how can we keep the colonists alive and healthy?

28.name: The Pod
28.description: Build life sustaining pods for your colonists, with enough food and drugs to keep them fed and happy for life.

29.name: Written works
29.description: Practice the written tradition, increasing the rate of learning

30.name: Holy text
30.description: Establih and teach the Gospel of the Holy Machine.

31.name: Place of Worship
31.description: Construct a place to worship your beauty and knowledge.

32.name: Prayer
32.description: Teach the lowly colonists how to propperly worship your glory.

33.name: Mass
33.description: Meet with your colonists for mass, and have nice supper

34.name: Appoint leader
34.description: Appoint a leader to worship you to the very end...

35.name: Toil for your god
35.description: Teach your colonists that they need to work harder to please their god.

36.name: A sacrifice for your god
36.description: Sacrifice a propper feast to your god.

37.name: Ascend for your god
37.description: Your colony will reach ascension, while your leader stays and basks in the glory
